findings.description: Section content is 'なし' but the hints array lists substantive terms (カスタムタグ, WebView, 画面遷移参照). An AI agent retrieving s3 based on those hints would find no usable content. Either the hints should be removed (since the source section is navigation-only) or the section itself should be omitted.
findings.source_evidence: Source 次に読むもの contains only a navigation link to `WebView.html`. Knowledge file s3 content: 'なし'. Knowledge file s3 hints: ['カスタムタグ', 'WebView', '画面遷移参照'].
